fact: The first official Test match was played between Australia and England in 1877.
India won the ICC Cricket World Cup in 1983 under Kapil Dev.
The FIFA World Cup was first held in 1930.
Brazil has won the FIFA World Cup five times.
Lionel Messi won the FIFA World Cup in 2022 with Argentina.
India won its first Thomas Cup in 2022.
PV Sindhu won a silver medal at the 2016 Olympics.
Wimbledon is the oldest tennis tournament in the world.
